title: Routing & Navigation
subtitle: Router setup, guards, resolvers, lazy loading, and preloading strategies
description: Angular's router is a full-featured client-side navigation system. Master route definitions, guards, resolvers, lazy loading, and the modern functional API introduced in Angular 15+.
learningOutcomes: Define routes with parameters, nested children, and auxiliary outlets
Read route parameters and query parameters with ActivatedRoute
Implement authentication guards using functional canActivate/canMatch
Pre-fetch data with route resolvers using the modern resolveFn syntax
Configure lazy loading with loadComponent and loadChildren for code splitting
Choose between preloading strategies based on application needs
Design nested routing hierarchies with named router outlets
